name: basic_backtrack_prevention
description: Cut prevents backtracking to other alternatives

name: without_cut_allows_backtrack
description: Without cut, backtracking to other alternatives works

name: cut_with_multiple_alternatives
description: Cut prevents sibling alternatives but not unrelated branches

name: cut_in_nested_rules
description: Cut in a nested rule prevents alternatives at that level
grammar:
S <- STMT*
STMT <- IF / ASSIGN
IF <- 'if' ↑ EXPR 'then' EXPR
ASSIGN <- NAME '=' EXPR
EXPR <- NAME / NUM
NAME <- < [a-z]+ >
NUM <- < [0-9]+ >
%whitespace <- [ \t]*

name: cut_does_not_affect_outer_choice
description: Cut only affects the immediate choice level, not outer choices
grammar:
S <- INNER / 'fallback'
INNER <- A / B
A <- 'a' ↑ 'x'
B <- 'a' 'y'
